fields.label: Source Line Ref
fields.description: EasyEcom-side line identifier (e.g. SKU / line id) the parent Sync Record's source payload carried.

fields.label: Source Line Number
fields.description: Ordinal of this line within the source document (§9 GRN payload's order: 1, 2, 3, …). Helps the FDE correlate this row back to a specific line on the upstream side when source_line_ref is non-unique or absent. Optional; flows may leave it 0 for upstream payloads that don't carry an ordinal.

fields.label: Target Field
fields.description: Mapped ERPNext target (e.g. item_code) — what this source line resolved to on the ERPNext side.

fields.label: Line Status
fields.description: Per §7.1.1: OK = line processed cleanly; Failed = blocked document creation (parent Sync Record is Failed); Discrepancy = reconciliation variance on a line (parent Sync Record is Failed, Integration Discrepancy raised). NEVER implies the parent succeeded — per-record outcome is binary (§7.3).

fields.label: Reason
fields.description: Plain-English reason when line_status is not OK. Populated by the flow handler that detected the issue.

fields.label: Integration Discrepancy
fields.description: Set when line_status=Discrepancy. Tracks resolution per §23. The target DocType is a §23 stub shipped pre-§9-Stage-2 (frozen contract: kind / status {Open/Resolved/Dismissed} / Dynamic Link reference / Company / reason / resolution_note); §23 will extend it with workflow, SLA, routing, etc. without breaking the stub fields.
